Help.faqDesc: Here are some frequently asked questions from our users about this topic. If you can't find an answer here, please contact our support team.
Help.proTipDesc: You can always open your settings via the profile menu in the top right corner of the screen.
Help.catBookingsPaymentsDesc: Manage your invoices, refunds and payment methods securely.
Help.catRentersDesc: Everything you need to know about finding and renting the perfect studio.
Help.catStudiosDesc: Everything about studios, facilities and what to expect.

Help.catCancellationsDesc: Understand the refund policy and how to cancel or reschedule bookings.
Help.faq1Q: How do I book a studio?
Help.faq1A: Search for a studio via \"Find a Studio\", choose a date and time, and follow the booking process. After confirmation you will receive a confirmation email.
Help.faq2Q: What is the standard cancellation policy?
Help.faq2A: Our standard cancellation policy offers a full refund up to 48 hours before the booking. Cancellations within 48 hours may be subject to a partial refund, depending on the host's settings.
Help.faq3Q: Can I book multiple days for a project?
Help.faq3A: Yes! You can book studios for multiple consecutive days. Many hosts offer discounts for longer bookings. Use the date picker when searching.
Help.faq4Q: Is equipment rental included in the price?
Help.faq4A: Equipment availability varies by studio. Some studios offer basic equipment, while others offer premium equipment as an add-on. Check each studio's listing for details.
Help.faq5Q: How do I update my billing details?
Help.faq5A: Go to your Profile Settings and navigate to the \"Billing\" section. You can update your payment methods and billing address and download invoices.

Credits.metaDescription: Buy credits and save on your studio bookings
Credits.title: Credits
Credits.subtitle: Buy credits upfront and save up to 40% on your studio bookings. Credits never expire.
Credits.step1Desc: Select the package that suits you. The more credits, the more discount.
Credits.step2Desc: Pay securely via iDEAL, credit card or SEPA. Your credits are added instantly.
Credits.step3Desc: Use your credits for any studio booking. 1 credit = 1 day of studio.
Credits.faqA1: No, your credits never expire. You can use them whenever you want.
Credits.faqQ2: Can I use credits for any studio?
Credits.faqA2: Yes, you can use your credits for all studios on the platform, regardless of type or location.
Credits.faqA3: 1 credit = 1 day of studio booking. The value depends on which package you buy - up to €60 per day with the Studio package.
Credits.faqQ4: Can I get my credits refunded?
Credits.faqA4: Unused credits cannot be refunded, but they never expire either. You can always use them later.
